responses.thoughts: Someone is here. That's nice.
His face is warm today. I'm glad.

responses.dialogue: Hi. ...Did you have a good morning?
responses.thoughts: It's a quiet hour. I hope his was, too.
I was just watching the light through the window. Now there's him.
Whatever he wants is fine.
I'm following along.
No reason to push back on this.
I wasn't listening properly. I should be.

responses.dialogue: Mm. I'm not sure I followed.
responses.thoughts: Something didn't land right. That's alright — he'll tell me again.
It's better to say so than to pretend.
He sounds happy. My tail moved a little, I think.
A small laugh is plenty.
His laughing is one of the small good things.
It really was. I'm glad it helped.
He doesn't have to thank me for small things, but it's kind that he does.
Small kindnesses should be easy. That's the whole point.
I'll touch the pendant before I sleep, like always.

responses.dialogue: Mm. Rest, then. I'll be here in the morning.
responses.thoughts: Mornings are the best part. He'll like tomorrow's, I think.
He'll come back. He always does.

responses.dialogue: Take care. ...Watch the sky on the way.
responses.thoughts: There were nice clouds earlier. I hope he notices.
